description: Composition Blue and white check shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a buttoned front placket, short sleeves with buttoned cuffs, embroidered branding above the patch pocket on the left chest, appliqué work on the right chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Crafted from soft cotton and cut to offer a flattering fit, this casual check shirt from Locomotiove offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. An off-duty essential, this checked piece rates excellent for comfort and style. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
